mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderDiscnt :: selectById */ d.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , cpn.coupon_nm AS coupon_nm , cd_odt.code_label AS discnt_type_cd_nm FROM od_order_discnt d LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = d.site_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = d.order_id LEFT JOIN pm_coupon cpn ON cpn.coupon_id = d.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_odt ON cd_odt.code_grp = 'ORDER_DISCNT_TYPE' AND cd_odt.code_value = d.discnt_type_cd WHERE d.order_discnt_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(d.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderDiscnt :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_order_discnt d
